summary: A silent clip about self-deportation that contrasts two outcomes with large bold text overlays: 'IF ICE FINDS YOU' over footage of an agent pinning a man to the ground, and 'IF YOU SELF-DEPORT' over migrants boarding a deportation charter. It ends on a CBP Home app screen stating a $1,000 exit bonus. It is a clip with text over b-roll and an app screen, with no music or genre styling.
notable_text: IF ICE FINDS YOU; IF YOU SELF-DEPORT; Home - Getting You Home Quickly And Easily; Receive a $1,000 exit bonus; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
